Package recoder.java

Interface Statement

Assert, Assignment, BinaryAndAssignment, BinaryOrAssignment, BinaryXOrAssignment, BranchStatement, Break, CatchAllStatement, ClassDeclaration, ContextStatementBlock, Continue, CopyAssignment, DivideAssignment, Do, EmptyStatement, EnhancedFor, EnumClassDeclaration, EnumConstructorReference, Exec, ExpressionJumpStatement, ExpressionSVWrapper, For, If, JavaStatement, JmlAssert, JumpStatement, LabeledStatement, LabelJumpStatement, LocalVariableDeclaration, LoopScopeBlock, LoopStatement, MergePointStatement, MethodBodyStatement, MethodCallStatement, MethodReference, MinusAssignment, ModuloAssignment, New, NewWrapper, ParenthesizedExpression, PassiveExpression, PlusAssignment, PostDecrement, PostIncrement, PreDecrement, PreIncrement, Return, RKeYMetaConstruct, RMethodBodyStatement, RMethodCallStatement, ShiftLeftAssignment, ShiftRightAssignment, SpecialConstructorReference, StatementBlock, StatementSVWrapper, SuperConstructorReference, Switch, SynchronizedBlock, ThisConstructorReference, Throw, TimesAssignment, TransactionStatement, Try, UnsignedShiftRightAssignment, While

  • Method Details

    • getStatementContainer

      StatementContainer getStatementContainer()
      Get statement container.
      Returns:
      the statement container.

    • setStatementContainer

      void setStatementContainer(StatementContainer c)
      Set statement container.
      Parameters:
      c - a statement container.

    • deepClone

      Statement deepClone()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Creates a deep clone of the current source element. For NonTerminalProgramElements, the parent roles are valid, except that the root element is not included anywhere and hence has no set parents, of course. This method also clones Comment s, but does not clone derived information such as scopes.
      Specified by:
      deepClone in interface SourceElement
